pr.title: Add AGENTS.md with Cursor Cloud development instructions
pr.body: Adds `AGENTS.md` with development environment instructions for Cursor Cloud agents. ### What's included - Overview of the project (single Rust binary crate, no workspaces) - Prerequisites (Rust stable toolchain >= 1.85, FFmpeg on PATH) - Key development commands table (build, lint, test, run) - Testing notes (alternate screen behavior, generating test videos, unit test scope) - Gotchas (VM default Rust toolchain too old for latest `clap_lex`, no Docker/databases needed) ### Environment verification All checks pass: - `cargo build` — compiles successfully - `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` — no warnings - `cargo test --verbose` — 4/4 tests pass - `cargo run -- /tmp/test_video.mp4` — renders ASCII art from video [vid2txt ASCII output](https://cursor.com/agents/bc-e02134ad-3cb2-478c-ac89-3bb8796f984f/artifacts?path=%2Fopt%2Fcursor%2Fartifacts%2Fvid2txt_ascii_output.txt) To show artifacts inline, enable in settings.
pr.author: horse-lover-fat
